sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، مِنَ الْجَيِّدِ أَنْ يَسَاعَدَ الْأَطْفَالُ فِي الْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, dobro je da djeca pomažu u kući.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, it is good for children to help at home.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطِّفْلُ مِنْ خِلَالِ الْمَسَاعَدَةِ الْمَسْؤُولِيَّةَ.
sentences.translationEn: A child learns responsibility through helping.

sentences.arabic: أَشْيَاءُ بَسِيطَةٌ مِثْلُ تَرْتِيبِ السَّرِيرِ كَافِيَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Jednostavne stvari poput pravljenja kreveta su dovoljne.
sentences.translationEn: Simple things like making the bed are enough.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا يُعَلِّمُهُمُ الِاعْتِمَادَ عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمْ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: To ih uči oslanjanju na sebe u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This teaches them to rely on themselves in the future.
